system.description:
When you **_make a roll with advantage_**, roll an extra die and discard the lowest result.

When you **_make a roll with disadvantage_**, roll an extra die and discard the highest result.

When you **_make a roll with both advantage and disadvantage_**, they cancel each other out.

If you **_have advantage/disadvantage on a damage roll_**, roll the main dice twice and discard the lower/higher result. Then add any bonus dice that apply.
